-- 4 of 6 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you about using Facebook Ads
when launching a product and what the structure looks
like around that. The most important thing to understand
when creating a launching structure is the mix of
constants and variables involved. Let me explain.
Persona Testing Example Structure:
Brand: Posh Peanut
Problem to Solve: New product launch cadence and
creative testing
Plan of Action: Utilizing best performing past launch
creative and variations of best performing prospecting
and remarketing audiences
LESSON:
PROSPECTING: PRODUCT
LAUNCH + CREATIVE
TESTING
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	If you launch a new product/SKU often. try
Prospecting Product Launch + Creative Testing.
❏ 	Pair your Best Selling Audiences with your
Winningest Creative.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	How to Launch a New Product
or Service Using Facebook Ads,
Entrepreneur
• 	How to Launch a Product With
Facebook Ads, Digital Marketer
